task_objective: Implement automatic sync feedback with frontend hooks and toast notifications.
tests_added: Added log level verification in tests/test_service.py
design_decisions: Used SteamClient.Apps.RegisterForAppRunningStateChanges to trigger auto-sync without blocking launch.
Upgraded auto-sync skip logs from debug to info for better visibility in the UI Log Modal.
Refined compare_recency to use Ludusavi's restore preview for reliable 'backup_newer' detection.
Implemented toast notifications for all major auto-sync events (checking, backing up, results).
results: Automatic sync now provides real-time feedback via toasts and logs. The system correctly identifies when a backup needs to be restored upon launch and ensures backups are performed on exit.
